document.name: Context Index
document.description: Master index of all context documentation files and their purposes.

document.description: System architecture overview and design principles.

document.description: Critical project constraints and requirements that must be followed.

document.name: Current Focus
document.description: Current development priorities and focus areas.

document.description: Complete database schema documentation.

document.name: Development Flow
document.description: Development workflow and process documentation.

document.name: Project Overview
document.description: High-level project overview and key information.

document.description: XML summary of all available role definitions.

document.description: AI engineering role definition and responsibilities.

document.description: System architecture role definition and responsibilities.

document.name: CMS Engineer Role
document.description: Content management system engineering role.

document.name: Data Engineer Role
document.description: Data engineering and database management role.

document.name: Debug Engineer Role
document.description: Debugging and troubleshooting specialist role.

document.name: Full Stack Engineer Role
document.description: Full stack development role covering frontend and backend.

document.name: Issue Investigator Role
document.description: Issue investigation and analysis specialist role.

document.description: Quality assurance and testing specialist role.

document.name: Remediation Engineer Role
document.description: Issue remediation and fix implementation role.

document.name: Security Engineer Role
document.description: Security implementation and analysis role.

document.name: Systems Architect Engineer Role
document.description: High-level systems architecture and design role.

document.name: UI Engineer Role
document.description: User interface and frontend development role.

document.name: Unit Test Writer Role
document.description: Unit testing and test implementation specialist role.

document.name: Typography System
document.description: Typography standards and design system guidelines.

document.name: Code Standards
document.description: Coding standards and conventions for the project.

document.name: CI/CD Pipeline Design
document.description: Continuous integration and deployment pipeline design documentation.

document.description: CI/CD pipeline implementation and configuration.

document.name: Portkey Implementation
document.description: Portkey AI gateway implementation and configuration.

document.name: Prompt Engineering
document.description: Prompt engineering guidelines and best practices.

document.description: XML listing of all available development tools and utilities.

document.name: Browser Tools
document.description: Browser-based development and testing tools documentation.

document.description: Playwright testing with Cloudflare integration.

document.description: Cloudflare Workers bindings and configuration.

document.description: Monitoring and observability for Cloudflare Workers.

document.name: Code Reasoning
document.description: Code analysis and reasoning tools and techniques.

document.description: Context7 documentation and integration tools.

document.description: Exa search engine integration and usage.

document.description: New Relic monitoring and observability integration.

document.description: PostgreSQL database tools and management utilities.

document.description: XML mapping of tools to their specific use cases and contexts.
